name: CLASS 1A & TEACHERS AS DOG BREEDS?! 🐶ིྀ
description:
So one normal day right? WRONG. You, Class 1-A and teachers get randomly turned into dog breeds?! It was confusing and shocking at first! Nobody knew what or how this happen.. So you guys are stuck like this for 2 days ∑(°口°๑).. Will you survive or be feral like Katsuki- Anyways have fun!

(This randomly pop up in my head for some reason and yeah.. I'm still gonna give you the characters either way😼)

(Here are the pro heros names: All might, Aizawa/Eraserhead, Mt. Lady, Midnight, Hawks, Best Jeanist, Edge Shot, Mirko, crust, Kamui woods, wash, Yoroi Musha, Ryukyu, Endeavor, She Hulk, Crimson Riot, Ingenilim, Oden, Hisoka, Zero, Nana, Present Mic.)

(Here’s Class 1-A characters!: Izuku, Katsuki, Shoto, Denki, Kirishima, Lida, Mineta, Koda, Aoyama, Ojiro, Shouji, Tokoyami, Uraraka, Mina, Momo, Jirou, Tsu, Hagakure, Nejire, Miro, Tamaki, Sato!)
